2026-04-10T00:59:15.1188971Z   **Title:** `[Azure AI Inference] Docs: Image Embeddings section missing — commented out with Python placeholder code`
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1189448Z   
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1189607Z   **Summary of gaps:**
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1190112Z   1. The `### Image Embeddings` section in Key Concepts (README.md lines 115-121) is commented out with a TODO and never exposed to readers
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1191013Z   2. The `### Image Embeddings example` section in Examples (README.md lines 310-348) is commented out with Python code from the Python SDK instead of C# code
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1191872Z   3. The bullet list at the top of the README (lines 10-11) has both "Get text embeddings" and "Get image embeddings" commented out
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1192358Z   
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1192504Z   
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1193263Z   4. Several related sections are also commented out, including the `EmbeddingsClient` and `ImageGenerationClients` descriptions, and the Text Embeddings key concepts section incorrectly links to Python SDK samples
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1194802Z   5. There are naming convention mismatches like using `client.embed` instead of C# PascalCase `client.Embed`, and `ImageEmbeddingsClient` was added in beta.3 but never documented
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1195836Z   6. A complete working example already exists in `Sample11_ImageEmbeddings.cs` with proper snippet regions that should be surfaced in the README
2026-04-10T00:59:15.1196481Z
